rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Petitioners' and Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Discovery is denied as the motion was not brought within 45 days of service of the responses. All requests for sanctions are denied. If either party wishes oral argument, give notice to the opposing party and to the court and appear on October 7, 2005 at 9 a.m. (612/HEWLETT)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Compelling Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Fo Rsanctions
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. The failure of Respondents Theresa Doering and Robert Christopher Doering to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Respondents are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Respondents in the amount of $526.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/HEWLETT)
